subject: Fermi GBM trigger 534174346/171205573 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (UAH) and A. von Kienlin (MPE) report on behalf of the
Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger
534339556/171207486 at 11:39:11.79 UT on 07 December 2017,
tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This
trigger is due to local particle activity.
